examples.text: […] فَإِنْ كَانُوا أَكْثَرَ مِنْ ذَٰلِكَ فَهُمْ شُرَكَاءُ فِي ٱلثُّلُثِ مِنْ بَعْدِ وَصِيَّةٍ يُوصَىٰ بِهَا أَوْ دَيْنٍ غَيْرَ مُضَارٍّ […]
examples.english: […] But if they are more than that, then they are to be sharers in a third after any will which was made or any debt [paid] without harm [to anyone]. […]
[…] This is a commandment from God and God is Knowing [and] Forbearing.

examples.text: فَأَجَابَ وَقَالَ لَهُمْ: «وَأَنْتُمْ أَيْضًا، لِمَاذَا تَتَعَدَّوْنَ وَصِيَّةَ اللهِ بِسَبَب تَقْلِيدِكُمْ.
examples.english: And answering He said to them, "Why also do you break the commandment of God on account of your tradition?
